t_ch: 灰宝！这种时候就别开玩笑啦，拿出气势来！
t_en: Grayie! This is no time for jokes! You've gotta show 'em who's boss!

t_ch: 缇宝大师的加入，让局势产生了些许变化。
t_en: Master Tribbie's involvement has somewhat affected the momentum.

t_ch: 既然如此，我也不再留情——来，让我试试，你是否真能撼动我的位置！
t_en: If that's the case, I won't hold back either. Come, let's see if you can really take my place!

t_ch: 我…输了。
t_en: I've... lost.

t_ch: 此后，「自由之角」将不复存在。你们可以自谋出路，不用再跟着我了。
t_en: From now on, the Horn of Freedom will cease to exist. You can all find your own paths. No need to follow me any longer.

t_ch: 老大！不要离开我们啊——
t_en: Boss! Don't leave us...

t_ch: 既然输，便要输的彻底。我会重新加入你的团队，如何处置，都听凭你差遣。
t_en: A defeat must be utterly complete. I will rejoin your squad — what you wish to do to me is at your discretion.

t_ch: 我会好好管教你的。
t_en: I will discipline you properly.

t_ch: 莫非你以为我还会要你？
t_en: You think I still want you?

t_ch: 哼。败者没有反驳的资格。但这只是我的失败，并非奇美拉整个族群的失败。
t_en: Hmph. The loser has no right of rebuttal. But the only one defeated was me, not the entire chimera tribe.

t_ch: 只有坚持奇美拉自治，充分发挥成员的自主性，做到自我激励、自我约束，贯彻自由与自律理念的团队，才能适应这个竞争愈发激烈的时代。
t_en: Only when we persist in chimera autonomy, fully leverage on our members' initiative, achieve self-motivation and self-discipline, and instill the ideals of freedom and self-restraint, can a squad adapt to this age of increasing competition.

t_ch: 由人类担任管理员的队伍，终将被更强大的奇美拉团体取代！
t_en: A human-led squad will be eventually replaced by an even stronger chimera community!

t_ch: 自由——！独立——！
t_en: Freedooom! Independeeeeence!

t_ch: 其实，我有个问题……
t_en: Actually, I have a question...

t_ch: 你想办法占据排行榜的首位，坚持由奇美拉担任管理员，认为这样才能提高效率。可是，队伍名次是由小奇美拉的工作量决定的。
t_en: You keep trying to occupy the top spot on the leaderboard, insisting on a chimera being an administrator, and believing that this is the only way to improve efficiency. But, a squad's rank is determined by the chimeras' work output.

t_ch: 你所有的努力，都是在为奥赫玛的居民服务呀。
t_en: All your efforts are in service of Okhema's citizens.

t_ch: …什么？！
t_en: ...What!?

t_ch: 我信奉的…建立最强奇美拉自治小队的理想，原来…是在帮助人类吗……
t_en: The ideal I believe in... creating the strongest autonomous chimera squad, is... to help humans...?

t_ch: 所有奇美拉都能幸福的世界，终究是不可能的吗……
t_en: A world where all chimeras can be happy, is it impossible...

t_ch: 嗷呜？…嗷呜嗷呜？
t_en: Awoo? ...Awoo-awoo?

t_ch: 这个问题的深奥程度似乎超过了奇美拉的思考能力，现场都陷入了沉默。
t_en: The profundity of this question has exceeded the chimera's thought capacity, and a muted silence descends.

t_ch: 这边——
t_en: Over here...

t_ch: 领奖台都布置好啦，请获胜队伍的管理员过来吧！
t_en: The award stage is all set up. The winning squad's administrator can come over now!

t_ch: 哎，原以为和这只小东西站在同一边，真能赚点什么回来，是我想多了啊。
t_en: *sigh* I thought there'd be some benefits to siding with this fellow. Looks like it was just wishful thinking.

t_ch: 你到底在计划些什么？
t_en: What the heck are you plotting now?

t_ch: 就是…你也见到了，我管理的小队出了点问题，没法跟生命花园交代。
t_en: It's... You saw it too — there was a hiccup with the squad I'm managing, and I couldn't explain it to the Garden of Life.

t_ch: 这只小东西就跑过来，提出和我结盟。如果我愿意帮忙的话，它可以帮我付罚款——我也不知道它究竟哪来的利衡币。
t_en: So this critter scampered over and suggested we work together. If I was willing to help, it would help me pay the fine. I also didn't know where it got the Balance Coins from.

t_ch: 原本的钱没挣到，现在还要倒赔一笔。这下可亏大了啊。
t_en: I didn't make any of the expected money, and now I have to pay a fine. This has been a huge loss.

t_ch: 你们是怎么交流的？
t_en: How'd you guys communicate?

t_ch: 这还不简单，我演示给你看啊。
t_en: It's super easy. I'll demonstrate.

t_ch: 眼前的男性趴在地上，指了指排行榜上的队伍名称，又指了指自己。
t_en: The man before you crouches on all fours, points at the squad's name on the leaderboard, then points at himself.

t_ch: 嗷呜——嗷呜嗷呜……
t_en: Awooooo, awoo-awoo...

t_ch: 升调表示这支队伍是接下来的对手，降调表示不值一提；发声急促表示赶紧动手，拖长尾音则是慢慢来。就这些。
t_en: A rising inflection indicates this squad is the next opponent, while a lower inflection means they're not worth mentioning. A hurried sound means to act quickly, while a drawn-out ending means to take it slow. That's all.

t_ch: 奇美拉能有多复杂的想法，嗨，就是唬唬人罢了。
t_en: How complex can chimeras' minds be? It's all just a bluff.

t_ch: 给花园的罚款交了吗？
t_en: You paid the fine to the Garden yet?

t_ch: 还没呢，我也在发愁，要是迟迟拖着不交，是要被送上公民大会的。
t_en: Not yet. I'm at my wits' end too. If I keep dragging this out, I'll be sent to the citizens' assembly.

t_ch: 我再去云石天宫想想办法吧。说不定泡在浴池里，就能冒出什么新主意来。
t_en: I'll head to Marmoreal Palace and think of other ideas. Who knows, I might be struck by inspiration in the bath.

t_ch: 咳咳。我要宣布：由{NICKNAME}管理的「{TEXTJOIN#215}」，成为了新的「工作冠军」！
t_en: Ahem. I hereby announce: {TEXTJOIN#215} led by {NICKNAME}, is the new work champion!

t_ch: ——大家鼓掌！
t_en: ...Applause, everyone!

t_ch: 太棒啦！
t_en: Wa-hey!

t_ch: 不愧是小灰，好厉害！
t_en: That's my Little Gray. Wonderful!

t_ch: 获得这个奖好像不是很开心。
t_en: Winning this award doesn't exactly make me happy.

t_ch: 我就是打工皇帝！
t_en: I am the ruler among workhorses!

t_ch: 正好所有人都在，就请获奖者来分享{F#她}{M#他}的成功经验吧——
t_en: Seeing as everyone's here, let's have the winner share {F#her}{M#his} success story!

t_ch: 能把这只名次垫底的小队，一路带到排行榜的首位，你究竟是有什么团队管理的秘诀呢，总不可能都是碰运气吧？
t_en: For a bottom-ranked squad to bulldoze its way to the top, what exactly is your secret to squad management? It couldn't have all been luck, right?

t_ch: 小灰。别藏着，快乐经过分享才会更加美味哦。
t_en: Little Gray, don't hide it. Happiness is sweeter when you share it.

t_ch: 我从最开始就在队伍里啦，但也不是很明白。
t_en: I've been with the squad from the start, but I never really understood either.

t_ch: 灰宝总是能找到让小奇美拉和睦相处，所有力都往一处使的办法，究竟是怎么做到的呢？给我们讲讲吧~
t_en: Grayie could always get the chimeras to get along with one another, ensuring that their efforts were all aligned. How did you even manage that? Tell us, please!

t_ch: 管理之道，就在其中——
t_en: Success to management, is within...

t_ch: （讲点正经的…）
t_en: (Say something serious...)

t_ch: 我同意大家的看法，奇美拉是种相当聪明的生物，很认真，也很有热情，愿意为奥赫玛的居民们解决麻烦。能取得如此成绩，都是它们的功劳。
t_en: I agree with everyone that chimeras are smart creatures — dedicated, passionate, and willing to solve troubles for Okhema's people. It is all thanks to their efforts that we've achieved such success.

t_ch: 但就像人类那样，奇美拉也有自己的性格与工作习惯。作为管理员，最重要的并非是催促它们干活，而是要找到最适合团队，适合每个成员的协作方式。
t_en: But just like humans, chimeras have their own personalities and work habits. As their administrator, the most important thing is not to rush them, but to find the squad with the best fit, and the best way to maximize their teamwork.

t_ch: 再差劲的奇美拉，也会有属于它的位置。谢谢。
t_en: Even the worst chimeras have their own roles to play. Thank you.

t_ch: （讲点高深的…）
t_en: (Say something profound...)

t_ch: 这是…属于理性的胜利！自由放任解决不了问题，只有在*充分*管理下的团队才能超越生物的极限。
t_en: This is... a victory that belongs to reason! A laissez-faire attitude won't cut it. Only a squad under ample management can surpass the limits of all life.

t_ch: 请相信，这一切真的值得。谢谢。
t_en: Please believe that everything is truly worth it. Thank you.

t_ch: （讲点滑稽的…）
t_en: (Say something comical...)

t_ch: 大家还记得我提出的第一个队名方案吗？那就是——开拓者说的都对！
t_en: Everyone still remember the first squad name I suggested? It was: The Trailblazer is always right!

t_ch: 这就是秘诀。谢谢。
t_en: This is my secret. Thank you.

t_ch: 嗷呜！集合了！预备——
t_en: Awoo! We're all assembled! Ready...

t_ch: ——管理员，您辛苦了嗷呜！！！
t_en: ...Administrator, you've worked hard, awoo!!!

t_ch: 哎，这群小家伙对我都没这么热情。掏出你的留影石机，和可爱的奇美拉拍个合照吧。
t_en: *sigh* These little ones aren't even that cushy with me. All right, take your photostone out and snap a group shot with these cuddly chimeras.

t_ch: 大家都靠近点，看镜头——
t_en: Get closer, everyone, eyes over here...

t_ch: 各就各位，预备——
t_en: Take your positions. Ready —

t_ch: ——嗷呜！
t_en: ...Awoo!

t_ch: 得到了珍贵的合影。尽管持续工作了这么长时间，照片里的小奇美拉依旧笑得很开心。
t_en: You obtained a precious group photo. Despite your prolonged work hours, the little chimera in the photo is laughing happily.

t_ch: 好可爱…好想带回家！
t_en: So cute... I want to take it home!

t_ch: 形势很严峻啊……
t_en: This is a grave situation...

t_ch: 你才刚成为管理员，很多事都不熟悉，就把目标放低点。我想想…<color=#dbc291ff>以第七名的队伍</color>为对手怎么样？
t_en: You just became an administrator, and aren't familiar with many matters, so you should lower your expectations. Let's see... How about setting the <color=#dbc291ff>seventh-ranked squad</color> as a goal to catch up with?

t_ch: 工作成绩达到这个标准才算是合格，先努力保住你的小队吧。
t_en: Our work performance must attain this standard to be considered acceptable. Let's just focus on keeping your squad together first.

t_ch: 没问题。
t_en: No problem.

t_ch: …是不是有点太快了？
t_en: Isn't this moving a bit too fast?

t_ch: 嗷呜……
t_en: Awoo...

t_ch: …又不是要告别，至于这么舍不得吗？
t_en: It's not like we're saying goodbye. Why so reluctant?

t_ch: 好了。你已经是个成熟的管理员，该学会自己去找些工作了。生命花园为你的队伍准备了些难度更高的委托，有空的话，就去看看吧。
t_en: Well, you're a fully-fledged administrator now. It's time to seek out work on your own. The Garden of Life has some more challenging assignments ready for your squad. Check them out when you have time.

t_ch: 怎么还要工作？
t_en: More work? Really?

t_ch: 嗷呜…就是，怎么还要工作嗷呜！
t_en: Awoo... Um, why do we still have to work awoo!

t_ch: 不管，奇美拉现在就要放假！
t_en: Nope, chimeras are on vacation, starting now!

t_ch: 放假！下班！您就是世界上最好的管理员嗷呜，蹭蹭——
t_en: Holiday! Finishing work! You're the best administrator in the world, awoo! *rub rub*

t_ch: 嗯。奇美拉忙碌了这么久，当然该好好休息下，那些委托在你有兴趣的时候来处理就好。
t_en: Of course. After all the hard work, the chimeras have earned some rest. The assignments can wait until you're ready.

t_ch: 最重要的…别忘了多陪陪这些小家伙呀。
t_en: Just remember... don't forget to spend more time with these little ones.

t_ch: 经过一番紧张刺激的测试，你正式成为了差分宇宙的头号贵宾。
t_en: After a bout of intense, thrilling tests, you have officially become the most esteemed guest of the Divergent Universe.

t_ch: 但人生在世，总会有千奇百怪的原因，让你和天才们天各一方，譬如——现在。
t_en: But in our vast existences, there will be countless peculiar twists of fate that separate you from the geniuses of the Cosmos — like right now, for example.

t_ch: 当然，也可能是不久后的将来。
t_en: Of course, it may also be a moment in the near future.

t_ch: 果然，即使有差分宇宙的支持，靠这点忆质的残渣就想构建翁法罗斯的模型，还是太勉强了。
t_en: As expected, even with the support of the Divergent Universe, trying to construct a model of Amphoreus from these mere scraps of memoria is still a bit of a stretch.

t_ch: 无中生有历来是迷思的做派，在「智识」的道路上，任何结论都应当有据可循。
t_en: Making something from nothing has always been Mythus's hallmark. On the journey of Erudition, every conclusion instead must be grounded in evidence.

t_ch: 忆庭之镜映照的封闭世界…我对两位无名客现状的担忧又增长了<unbreak>12</unbreak>％。
t_en: A sealed world reflected in the Garden's mirror... My concern for the state of the two Nameless has just increased by another <unbreak>12%</unbreak>.

t_ch: 哼，到底是什么宝贝，能让三重命途裹得严严实实的？等把他俩从里面捞出来，我可得好好盘问盘问。
t_en: Hmph, what kind of wonder could possibly cover up three Paths in such a waterproof way? I've gotta thoroughly interrogate those two when I get them out of there.

t_ch: 此时此刻，翁法罗斯内。
t_en: Currently, in Amphoreus...

t_ch: 你恍然回过神来，这里是「神悟树庭」。即使并非初次来访，你还是被眼前的光景所震慑。
t_en: You snap back to reality — this is the Grove of Epiphany. Even though it's not your first time here, the scenery before you still manages to leave you speechless in awe.

t_ch: 你还记得，自己之所以来到这儿，是为了追逐某个悠远的声音。
t_en: You still remember that you came here to pursue that distant voice.

t_ch: 「{F#少女}{M#少年}啊，你渴望智慧吗？」
t_en: "{F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, do you desire wisdom?"

t_ch: 没错，就是这声音！
t_en: That's it! This voice!

t_ch: 来吧，我将给予你树庭中最伟大的宝藏。
t_en: Come. I shall bestow upon you the greatest treasure of the Grove.

t_ch: 闹鬼了！
t_en: A ghost!

t_ch: 嘿！你这年轻人，怎么说话的？
t_en: Hey! Watch your tongue, young one.

t_ch: 我渴望星琼。
t_en: I desire Stellar Jades.

t_ch: 可惜，这里没有财富，但有比财富更珍贵的东西——知识。
t_en: Alas, there's no wealth to be here, though there is something much more precious — knowledge.

t_ch: 我乃是伟大的智者卡利多托斯，留下的一缕神智，作为「目录」的大图书管理员。
t_en: I am a strand of consciousness left behind by the Great Sage Calidorthos to manage this grand library, known as the Index.

t_ch: 不就是鬼？
t_en: Isn't that just a ghost?

t_ch: 我懂了，是数字生命。
t_en: Got. A digital lifeform then.

t_ch: 有小孩子不能看的吗？
t_en: Got anything in here that's adult-only?

t_ch: 你，你这，嘶——嘶，念在你尚有可教化的余地，姑且原谅你的愚钝。
t_en: Y—You! Hiss... I shall graciously overlook your foolishness, considering there is yet room for your education.

t_ch: 众所周知，友爱之馆的经卷数量庞大，而历代学者的研究更是多如艾格勒的睫毛，杂乱无章。
t_en: It is well known that the Library of Philia holds a vast collection of scrolls, and the research of scholars across generations is as numerous as Aquila's eyelashes — a massive mess of disordered, disorganized papers.

t_ch: 我和同僚们费尽毕生心血，才把它们成功编织进了圣树的记忆。
t_en: My colleagues and I poured our lives into weaving all that research into the Sacred Tree's memories.

t_ch: 借由{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的根系和{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}的金丝，这些智慧得以向外延伸，覆盖树庭的各个角落，交错成承载知识的网络。
t_en: Through {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces'{RUBY_E#} roots and {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia's{RUBY_E#} golden threads, this wisdom has been able to extend outward, enveloping every corner of the Grove, interwoven into a network that bears knowledge.

t_ch: 只要心怀对泰坦的敬畏，任何人都能通过触碰它，浏览经卷，交流学术，同历代先贤乃至瑟希斯留下的知识产生共鸣。
t_en: So long as one holds reverence for the Titans, any may touch it, peruse its scrolls, engage in discourse, and resonate with the knowledge left behind by sages of old or even those left by Cerces.

t_ch: 你们也网上冲浪？
t_en: You folks surf the net too?

t_ch: 我靠！织网！
t_en: Woah! The interweb!

t_ch: 大数据真是无处不在。
t_en: Big data is truly everywhere.

t_ch: 受黑潮的侵蚀，地下的网络逐渐坏死，真正保留下来的，也只有些许残卷。
t_en: Corrupted by the black tide, the underground network is slowly decaying. What remains is nothing more than scattered remnants of certain scrolls.

t_ch: 但功夫不负有心人，我终归还是等到了可以托付的继承者。
t_en: But perseverance rewards the steadfast. In the end, I have found a successor to whom I can entrust this place.

t_ch: 你看人的眼光真准。
t_en: You've got a keen eye.

t_ch: 你说的是谁啊？
t_en: Who're you talking about?

t_ch: 我不是，你不要乱说。
t_en: I'm not it. Stop spouting nonsense.

t_ch: 来不及拒绝，一道炫目的光辉便渗入你的思维，将你的神识摄入盘根错节的根系当中。
t_en: Before you can refuse, a blinding radiance soaks into your thoughts, encompassing your soul essence into the labyrinthine root system.

t_ch: 你睁开眼，不敢相信眼前的场景。
t_en: You open your eyes, barely able to believe the sight before you.

t_ch: 这不{TEXTJOIN#87}吗？
t_en: Isn't this {TEXTJOIN#87}?

t_ch: 我想测差分宇宙想出幻觉了？
t_en: I wanted to test the Divergent Universe so much that I've started to hallucinate?

t_ch: 我回来了？
t_en: I'm back?

t_ch: 老夫果然没看错人，不过是从记忆中采撷的一隅，竟有传说中那僭主的天舟一般的气派。
t_en: Indeed, I was not mistaken in my judgment. It is but a mere shard drawn from memory's depths, yet it bears the majesty of an astral vessel, akin to the tyrant's fabled skyship.

t_ch: 正所谓「美德即知识」，「德性」是智慧的起源，也是智慧的终点。
t_en: As the saying goes, "virtue is knowledge" — virtue is wisdom's origin and finale.

t_ch: 这里收集了翁法罗斯古往今来的神话和历史，从众神和英雄身上，我们得以学会「什么是美德」。
t_en: Gathered here are Amphoreus' collective myths and histories throughout its entire existence. We learn what virtue is from gods to heroes.

t_ch: 同时，它也会汲取学者的过往，让人们「认识你自己」，打造出独属于他们的试炼。
t_en: At the same time, it draws from the past of scholars, allowing people to understand themselves, forging trials and tribulations unique only to them.

t_ch: 你的内心选择了这艘天舟， 构建出这番场景，作为踏上求索之旅的门扉。
t_en: Your heart has chosen the skyship, shaping this very scene as the gate to embark on a voyage of discovery.

t_ch: 这也太真了。
t_en: This is all too real.

t_ch: 泰坦神迹？泰坦科技！
t_en: Titan Miracle? Titan technology!

t_ch: 原来是树庭神域。
t_en: So this is the Grove Art Online.

t_ch: 你甚至怀疑，下一刻就能跑出来一个模拟螺丝咕姆或者拟似黑塔。
t_en: You even find yourself doubting whether a simulated Screwllum or Herta might appear in the next moment.

t_ch: 总之，你的神识会在这里与传说同行，塑造你的德性，令你成为真正的智者，乃至，真正的英雄。
t_en: In any case, your soul essence will walk alongside legends here, shaping your virtue and forging you into a true sage — and, eventually, a true hero.

t_ch: 多说无益，年轻人，准备踏入知识的河流吧。
t_en: Excessive words are not necessary here, young one. Prepare to tread forth into the river of knowledge.

t_ch: 比我预想的还要快…只不过，「命途」、「祝福」、「方程」，你用来解读泰坦的方式，实在有些别致。
t_en: It is much more rapid than I anticipated... but Paths, Blessings, Equations — how you interpret the Titans are indeed unconventional.

t_ch: 感觉像是硬套公式…
t_en: Feels like you're trying to force a formula onto something that doesn't actually fit...

t_ch: 别管老三样能不能套公式解开泰坦的秘密，程序能跑不就得了？不要在意这些细节。
t_en: As long as the program works, it doesn't matter whether these three old variables can be formulaically used to unlock the Titans' secrets. We shouldn't get caught up in the details.

t_ch: 即使是泰坦，想要理解从未见过的事物，也是无稽之谈。唯有用已知解读未知，循序渐进，因材施教，才能达到教化的初衷。
t_en: Even the Titans cannot understand things they have never seen. The original purpose of enlightenment can only be reached through interpreting the unknown using the known, forging ahead steadfastly, and tailoring education according to an individual's nature.

t_ch: 既然树庭选择以这种方式将知识传授给你，那就一定有它的道理。
t_en: Since the Grove elects to impart knowledge to you through such a method, it must have its reasons.

t_ch: 况且，神话嘛，总会因凡人的无知，出现牵强和杜撰。
t_en: Moreover, these are myths after all — they are bound to be subject to mortal ignorance, giving rise to embellishments and fabrications.

t_ch: 结果还是在这儿测试。
t_en: At the end of the day, we're still doing tests at this very place.

t_ch: 或许，就像主角要配球棒一样，哪怕是模拟的，差分宇宙也和{TEXTJOIN#87}更配吧。
t_en: Maybe like how a protagonist must have a baseball bat, the Divergent Universe is much more compatible with {TEXTJOIN#87} even if it's a simulation.

t_ch: 泰坦神迹什么都能解释吗？
t_en: Can Titan Miracles explain everything?

t_ch: 瑟希斯的智慧，我亲爱的朋友。
t_en: It's Cerces's wisdom, my dear friend.

t_ch: 对不起螺丝咕姆，我玩了盗版。
t_en: Sorry Screwllum, I'm playing a pirated version here.

t_ch: 没关系，等你把这里的记忆带给他，他一定会很高兴的。
t_en: It's fine. He'll be overjoyed when you bring the memories you made here to him.

t_ch: 在你的身上，我看到了许多和那些英雄相似的地方。
t_en: I see many traits similar to those heroes in you.

t_ch: 我不曾相信过顽劣的扎格列斯，但能为馆藏找到你这样一位继承人，也让我不得不赞美一番，那诡计的贼星带来的机运。
t_en: I've never put much faith in the unruly Zagreus, but I have to praise the opportunity bequeathed by that Thief Star for me to discover an heir such as you for the library's collection.

t_ch: 记住，「勿忘英雄与美德」。英雄并非超人的存在，那些所有人都能拥有的美德，才是锻造英雄的火焰。
t_en: Remember, "Never forget the heroes and their virtues." Heroes aren't extraordinary existences — Virtues that everyone can possess forge the flames of a hero.

t_ch: 「勿忘及时的自省」。自我的试炼绝非一日之功，傲慢和懈怠连泰坦也能腐蚀。
t_en: "Never forget timely self-reflections." The trials of the self are not accomplished in a day — pride and negligence can even corrupt Titans.

t_ch: 我也会再去根系的内部找找，没准儿还能翻出些没被黑潮侵蚀的残篇。知识的继承者，愿瑟希斯荫蔽你的愚钝。
t_en: I will also return to searching within the root system. Perhaps I will uncover some remnant pages unsullied by the black tide. Heir of knowledge, may Cerces shield your ignorance.

t_ch: 我们到了。梦想之地的风景总是令人眼花缭乱，我有位博识学会的朋友对此颇有怨词。
t_en: We're here. The scenery in the Land of the Dreams is confusingly dazzling, and I have a friend from the Intelligentsia Guild who has quite some scathing words for it.

t_ch: 跟踪演算命途力量的涨落和相互干涉，我们将得以构建种种事物诞生的可能性和变化趋势。
t_en: By tracking the fluctuations and mutual interferences of the extrapolated Path Energy, we will be able to construct the various possibilities and trends of change of creation.

t_ch: 以这些方程式为基础，诸多看似紊乱不堪的事物，都能在差分宇宙中，以相对简洁的方式得到描述，展现出背后的联系。
t_en: With these equations as the foundation, many seemingly chaotic phenomena will be described relatively simplistically in the Divergent Universe, and their underlying connections revealed.

o((•ω‡= )o "Unnecessary." )∋

t_ch: 泡泡骄傲地摇着尾巴，看得出来它的胜负心得到了极大的满足。经过了小组赛的磨砺，你们的配合也越来越好了……
t_en: Bubbles wags its tail proudly, clearly satisfied with the outcome. After the grind of the group stage, your teamwork has definitely improved...

t_ch: （这家伙不会因为预言的事，对我有所隐瞒吧？）

t_ch: 在短暂的休赛期后，「豹豹碰碰大作战」<color=#dbc291ff>淘汰赛</color>正式开启，所有持有「银盏徽章」的选手，将在这一阶段决出通往冠军赛的胜者。
t_en: The Seal Slammers <color=#dbc291ff>Elimination Rounds</color> will commence after a short break. All contestants bearing a Silver Chalice Badge will compete for a shot at the championship.

t_ch: ——在介绍选手之前，给现场的各位观众朋友们紧急插播一条好消息！
t_en: Before we meet our contestants, I have some exciting news to share, so hold onto your seats, everyone!

t_en: An unsound oracle has been circulating recently — "the golden trophy shatters with no champion."

t_ch: 不过，请各位放心。阿格莱雅大人已在「金海豹杯」周围布下了细密的金线，再加上各位现场观众雪亮的眼睛，那虚假的预言绝不会实现！
t_en: But please, have no fear! Lady Aglaea has meticulously surrounded the Gold Seal Cup with golden thread, and with all of you watching, that false prophecy stands no chance!

t_ch: 接下来，我们继续介绍持有「银盏徽章」的选手……
t_en: Moving on, we'll introduce the contestants with Silver Chalice Badges...

t_en: Now that the contestants advancing from the group stages have been revealed, the exciting Elimination Rounds will now begin—

t_en: Hmph! For His Majesty Mydei, every day is his day. But I am but a pale shadow of his strength, and I must seize the day — hence the name Yourdei.

t_ch: 这孩子数学是不是不太好…
t_en: That pun's possessive pronouns and logic both need some serious work...

t_ch: 谁说咱「十敌」数学不好啊？这数学可太好了。

t_en: I adopted this posture to prove Lord Yourdei's great strength!

t_en: I may be Yourdei today, but tomorrow I shall be Theirdei, someday I will be strong enough to be Ourdei, and, eventually, it'll be my day to stand beside His Majesty!

t_ch: 这，正是王的风范！
t_en: Behold — the true bearing of a king!

t_ch: 都记好咯！

t_en: This is no ordinary baby seal. It has endured scorching baths and traversed the nether realm. None here but I am worthy to command it!

t_ch: o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o「我要跟你豹了！」)∋
t_en: o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o "Ready to rumble!")∋

t_ch: 嗷呜嗷呜，我也跟你豹了！
t_en: Awoo-awoo, let's get this fight started!

t_ch: 看来比赛的双方都热情高涨啊，那么比赛正式——

Halt—

Very well—

t_ch: 啊这…我们尊重悬锋城传统…待「十敌」选手饮完鲜血蜜酿，比赛将立刻开始。
t_en: Well... Out of respect for the customs of Castrum Kremnos... We'll start once Yourdei has finished his sanguine honey brew.

t_ch: 哼，败便败了。
t_en: Hmph, I know when I'm beaten.

t_ch: 接下来的路就只剩王之{RUBY_B#回家}「归乡」{RUBY_E#}了。
t_en: Time for the royal {RUBY_B#to go home}homecoming{RUBY_E#} now.

t_ch: 我记住你了，{NICKNAME}。我「十敌」的字典里会给你的名字留出位置——
t_en: I won't forget you, {NICKNAME}. Your name has earned its place in my dictionary—

t_ch: 走吧，已经不用再战斗了…红温海豹。
t_en: Come on, Red Hot Seal. No more fighting for us.
o((◉ω◉ ! )o "...Speechless!")∋

t_ch: 发什么呆？走吧，属于我们的时代已经落幕了。
t_en: Stop gawking! Our moment has passed.

t_ch: 那个…呃，「十敌」阁下……
t_en: Uh... Lord Yourdei...

t_ch: 请问我可以起来了吗？腰…有点撑不住了，另外…今天的盒饭在哪领？
t_en: Is it okay to get up now? My back's giving out, and... about today's lunch...

t_ch: 盒饭，什么盒饭？
t_en: Lunch? Where?

t_ch: 你这个饭桶！不…{NICKNAME}，我不是说你。
t_en: You glutton! Wait... {NICKNAME}, I wasn't talking about you.

t_ch: 看！这就是老戏骨！
t_en: Now that's some professional acting!

t_ch: <size=28>演的什么玩意这是！</size>
t_en: <size=28>This is terrible acting!!!</size>

t_ch: 等会结束了，你去找吾师克拉特鲁斯领——我刚才那种「英雄迟暮」的感觉好不容易出来了，结果全让你破坏了。
t_en: Get your food from my teacher Krateros after we're done here. I had the perfect "fallen hero" mood going until you went and wrecked it.

t_ch: 哎呀…走吧走吧，吃饭吃饭。
t_en: Oh, did I now? Come on, let's go, it's chow time.

t_ch: …呃。「十敌」选手这一轮惜败，{NICKNAME}选手取得胜利。刚好，另一边淘汰赛的结果也已经出来了，取得胜利的选手是——山之民的厨师达利安！
t_en: ...Uh, okay. Yourdei has been eliminated, and {NICKNAME} advances. And it just so happens our other match has concluded as well — and the winner is Dorian, the Mountain Dweller chef!

t_ch: …嗯？达利安人呢？
t_en: ...Wait, where's Dorian?

t_ch: 山之民达利安将比赛资格让给我了，现在本大爷就是达利安。
t_en: Dorian the Mountain Dweller gave me his spot — now I am Dorian.

t_ch: 你看，这是他给我的「银盏徽章」。
t_en: Look, I have his Silver Chalice Badge right here.

t_ch: 巴特鲁斯根本就不是选手！
t_en: This "Bartholos" guy isn't even a contestant!

t_ch: 等等，让我辩解一下。
t_en: Hold up, at least let me explain myself!

t_ch: 对于你的发言，先质疑再质疑。
t_en: Like I'd trust anything coming out of your mouth.

t_ch: 那不就只剩质疑了吗？
t_en: Is there really so little love between us?

t_ch: 我是诚心想请教赛事主办方——
t_en: I just have a quick question for the organizers—

t_ch: 请问参加「豹豹碰碰大作战」淘汰赛的选手，都有「银盏徽章」，对吧？
t_en: Every contestant in the "Seal Slammers" Elimination Round needs to possess a Silver Chalice Badge, right?

t_ch: 对的对的。
t_en: Yes, that's correct.

t_ch: 桀桀，那反过来，没有「银盏徽章」，就意味着没有参加淘汰赛资格吧？
t_en: Hehehe, so by that logic, no badge means no right to compete in the Elimination Round, right?

t_ch: 不对不对不对，啊…对的对的。
t_en: No, that's not right, no, I mean... y—yes, that's correct.

t_ch: 桀桀桀，现在我有徽章，大块头没有。所以我能参加比赛，他不能。
t_en: Hehehe, right now I've got the badge and the big guy doesn't. That makes me the contestant, not him.

t_ch: 对对对…对吗？不对，哎呀不对不对。
t_en: Right, yes, that's ri— no wait, oh no, no, that's not right!

t_ch: 哎…到底对还是不对？不对吗？
t_en: Wait... is that right or wrong? It's wrong, right?

t_ch: 桀桀，想要回徽章，先追上我再说吧！
t_en: Hehehe, you want the badge back? Come get it yourself!

t_ch: 小贼，哪里跑？
t_en: Stop right there, you sneaky thief!

t_ch: 休想让我在活动里跑图！
t_en: No way am I doing map traversal during an event!

t_ch: 桀桀——溜了！
t_en: Hehehe— Later!

t_ch: 原来你在这里，快把徽章还给我！
t_en: There you are! Hand over my badge!

t_ch: 问问阿波菲斯
t_en: Ask Apophis

t_ch: 经历了小小的波折，我们重新回到淘汰赛中，现在站在浴池两边的是臭名昭著的「贼灵」巴特鲁斯选手和{NICKNAME}选手！
t_en: After that little hiccup, we're back to our Elimination match! In the bathhouse arena today, we have the infamous "Spirithief" Bartholos facing off against {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 求求你，把我放臭名昭著前面。
t_en: Would it kill you to introduce me before the notorious troublemaker?

t_ch: …对不起！是{NICKNAME}选手和臭名昭著的「贼灵」巴特鲁斯选手。
t_en: ...Oh, pardon me! Let me rephrase that: we have {NICKNAME} going up against the notorious Spirithief Bartholos!

t_ch: 你们不会以为我临时参赛，毫无准备吧？看好了——
t_en: Think I came unprepared just because I joined last minute? Watch this—

t_ch: o((■ω■- )o「看着吧，在黑暗面前一切都是苍白的」)∋
t_en: o((■ω■- )o "Watch — as everything fades to nothing before darkness!")∋

t_ch: 它原本是只普通小海豹，但现在它已经屈服于欲望「豹变」成了黑化海豹！
t_en: Once an innocent baby seal, it has now succumbed to darkness and evolved into a Dark Seal!

t_ch: 哇，漆黑的海豹大人！
t_en: Wow, it's Pitch-Dark Seal the Great!

t_ch: 嗷呜嗷呜，不过是只紫黑色的皮蛋而已，拽什么拽？
t_en: Awoo-awoo, who're you trying to impress? You're just purple and black pudding!

t_ch: 我是数学老师，我要过程。
t_en: "Evolved"? I see no gradual adaption to natural selection pressures here.

t_ch: 桀桀，小海豹的黑化都是一瞬间的事，没有过程！
t_en: Hehehe, there was none! Turning to the dark side requires no more than a momentary embrace!

t_ch: 区区黑洞，看我用泡泡推出去。
t_en: More like a trifling chocolate trifle! Bubbles will blow it out of the water.

t_ch: o((◔ω◔¯ )o「你什么时候产生了能战胜豹的错觉」)∋
t_en: o((◔ω◔¯ )o "Aww, someone's got delusions of winning against me~")∋

t_ch: o((■ω■- )o「泡泡…你相信引力吗？」)∋
t_en: o((■ω■- )o "Say, Bubbles... ever heard of a little thing called gravity?")∋

t_ch: o((■ω■- )o「你我之间的邂逅，会以我吞噬你为终点…」)∋
t_en: o((■ω■- )o "When our paths collide, you'll be the one getting swallowed...")∋

t_ch: 嗷呜～被重力束缚住灵魂的小海豹，是不会懂得正面冲撞的意义的。
t_en: Awoo~ A baby seal bound by gravity will never understand the meaning of a head-on collision.

t_ch: 留在这里只会让你污染赛场，看我一头把你撞飞！
t_en: Your presence taints this arena — I'll blast you right out of here!

t_ch: 如此无所不吞的力量，和我的内心深处的贪婪多么相配，怎么会一败涂地？
t_en: A power that swallows everything, one that mirrors my bottomless greed... how could it crumble so pathetically?

t_ch: o((〒ω〒;  )o「豹风吸入太多，游不动了…」)∋
t_en: o((〒ω〒; )o "Oof... too stuffed with seal energy to swim...")∋

t_ch: 可恶！差点就爱上比赛的感觉了，都怪你这样的老玩家沉重打击了新人。
t_en: You little...! I was finally starting to enjoy this, but then you veterans just had to go stomping all over a newbie.

t_ch: 就当是对偷窃行为的惩罚吧。
t_en: That's what you get for stealing.

t_ch: 代表山之民惩罚我是吧？你们都合起伙来欺负我巴特鲁斯！
t_en: So you're punishing me on behalf of the Mountain Dweller? You're all ganging up on poor little me!

t_ch: 说完你的退场台词赶紧走吧。
t_en: Oh please, just say your exit line and scram.

t_ch: 怎么就剩这么点戏份了？
t_en: Is this really all the screentime I get?

t_ch: 下台！下台！下台！
t_en: BOOOOOOOO! GET OUT! GET OUT!

t_ch: 你们也欺负我。让我在这么多人面前丢脸，太可恶啦！但这就想让我放弃？没那么简单。
t_en: Now you're all turning on me too? Making me look like a fool in front of everyone — that's low! But if you think this'll break me, you're dead wrong.

t_ch: 桀桀桀，我兜里的花样比你们想象的更多，咱们——走着瞧！
t_en: Hehehe, you haven't seen half of what I can do, so — stay tuned!

t_ch: o((◔ω◔¯ )o「桀桀，小海豹的梦想，是不会终结的！」)∋
t_en: o((◔ω◔¯ )o "Hehehe, a baby seal's dream never dies!")∋

t_ch: 就连「贼灵」也爱上了「豹豹碰碰大作战」，我宣布{NICKNAME}选手取得胜利！
t_en: Would you look at that — even our Spirithief can't get enough of "Seal Slammers"! Victory goes to {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}选手，要直接进入下一轮比赛吗？你的对手已经准备好了。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, ready for the next round? Your opponent is ready.

t_ch: 没问题，乘胜追击！
t_en: Absolutely, strike while the iron's hot!

t_ch: 我先休息一下。
t_en: I need a break first.

t_ch: 究竟冠军赛的资格——<color=#dbc291ff>「金盏徽章」</color>将要花落谁手呢？
t_en: Now, which contestant will claim the <color=#dbc291ff>Golden Chalice Badge</color> and secure their Championship spot?

t_ch: 缇宁…不是很擅长说话的环节，我们直接开始吧……
t_en: We are... not much of a talker. Can we just get started...?

t_ch: 啊这…咱们就聊一句，缇宁大人的小海豹看上去好个性啊，能讲讲吗？
t_en: Uh, well, we still need to have some kinda intro... Say, Lady Trinnon, that's quite a unique seal you've got there! Care to tell us about it?

t_ch: …它是双色海豹，可靠的伙伴。
t_en: It's a... Duotone Seal. A reliable partner.

t_ch: 有劲敌！是红蓝经典配色。
t_en: Now we're talking! Love that iconic red and blue!

t_ch: o(-`<color=#eb4d3dff>ω</color><color=#73b0f4ff>ω</color>´-# )っ「该细数你的罪恶了~」)∋
t_en: o(-`<color=#eb4d3dff>ω</color><color=#73b0f4ff>ω</color>´-# )っ "Time to face your sins~")∋

t_ch: 这海豹是白厄搭配的颜色？
t_en: Did you base those colors on Phainon?

t_ch: o(-`<color=#eb4d3dff>ω</color><color=#73b0f4ff>ω</color>´-# )o「哼哼，豹跟不懂红蓝配色的人没话说~」)∋
t_en: o(-`<color=#eb4d3dff>ω</color><color=#73b0f4ff>ω</color>´-# )o "Hmph, I don't talk to those who can't appreciate red and blue~")∋

t_ch: 你这主持人别再没话找话了，快点开始，我们要赢下这场比赛！
t_en: Enough with the chitchat, host! Get on with it — we've got a match to win!

t_ch: 好好好…毕竟巴特鲁斯也耽误了不少时间，我宣布比赛立刻开始！
t_en: Alright, alright, fine... Bartholos did waste a lot of time, so let the match... begin!

t_ch: 淘汰赛的最后一轮对战双方，竟然是{NICKNAME}选手和缇宁选手！
t_en: For the final Elimination Round, we have {NICKNAME} facing off against Trinnon!

t_ch: 真是一点都不让人意外呢。
t_en: Well, color me unsurprised.

t_ch: …但你可以为了我们的气氛再惊讶一些。
t_en: You could try acting shocked, at least — a little enthusiasm for the crowd wouldn't hurt.

t_ch: 惊。
t_en: Shocking.

t_ch: 真是毫无感情的惊讶。
t_en: That might be the flattest "shocked" face in history.

t_ch: 来了，关键比赛必遇熟人定律…
t_en: Here we go again — it's that classic "bumping into friends during key matches" trope...

t_ch: 这说明小灰的熟人遍地都是呀。
t_en: No, it's just because you've got friends everywhere, Little Gray!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}选手以不可阻挡的实力，击败了缇宁选手。这下雅努萨波利斯的双子…双双沉船，我们不得不送别缇宁选手离场。
t_en: {NICKNAME} has crushed Trinnon with overwhelming power. And just like that, both contenders from Janusopolis have been... eliminated. It's time for us to bid Trinnon farewell.

t_ch: 谢谢大家，小灰…你赢了……
t_en: Thank you, everyone. And Little Gray... You won fair and square...

t_ch: 哎嘿，一不小心就赢了。
t_en: Aw, I didn't mean to win, just kinda blundered into it...

t_ch: …小灰，总是这么开朗，*我们*也从你身上，学到了很多。
t_en: Little Gray, always so cheerful... We've learned so much from you.

t_ch: 抱歉…这个游戏，我有必胜法。
t_en: Sorry, it's just that I've got this game all figured out.

t_ch: 与其说必胜法，不如说小灰和泡泡的实力远在*我们*之上。
t_en: Rather, it's more that Little Gray and Bubbles are just way beyond us in skill.

t_ch: 平时…我总是躲在缇宝和缇安身后，胆子也是*我们*当中最小的。
t_en: We've always been the most timid of us three, always hiding behind Tribbie and Trianne...

t_ch: 缇宝最爱笑，总是给奥赫玛城的大家，拭去眼泪，带来温暖的希望。
t_en: Tribbie's the cheerful one, always there to dry tears and bring hope to everyone in Okhema.

t_ch: 缇安能开「百界门」，又那么勇敢地替*我们*分担了许多危险。
t_en: Trianne can open the Century Gate, and she's always so brave, protecting us from all kinds of danger.

t_ch: 可缇宁…缇宁只是待在生命花园，除了宣读神谕，能做的事情，很少……
t_en: But we... we just stay in the Garden of Life, doing nothing but delivering prophecies...

t_ch: 这次…其实是缇宁自己提出的，想和缇宝分开来比赛。因为缇宁想做独当一面的缇宁。
t_en: This match... we chose to enter without Tribbie. We wanted to prove that Trinnon could be strong on our own.

t_ch: 不知道…缇宁有没有做到……
t_en: We're not sure... if we actually managed to do that...

t_ch: 缇宁大人，你已经是了。
t_en: You already have, Lady Trinnon.

t_ch: 缇宁大人你比缇宝大人走得更远，来到了淘汰赛的最终轮。
t_en: You've already gone further than Lady Tribbie — you've made it to the final elimination round.

t_ch: 其实*我们*俩不分胜负，只不过缇宝她先遇上了小灰……
t_en: In truth, compared to Tribbie... We're equally strong. Tribbie just happened to run into Little Gray first...

t_ch: 你好认真，不像我只想靠队友。
t_en: You're putting in some serious effort, while I'm just riding on my teammate's coattails.

t_ch: 嗷呜嗷呜？你…是认真的？
t_en: Awoo-awoo? Do you... really mean that?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}选手一定是在认真地…调节气氛吧。
t_en: {NICKNAME} must be seriously... trying to lighten the mood.

t_ch: 嗷呜～缇宁大人，泡泡也能独当一面吗？
t_en: Awoo~ Lady Trinnon, do you think I could be strong on my own too?

t_ch: 泡泡这么强…缇宁能做到的，你当然也能做到。
t_en: With your strength, Bubbles... If Trinnon can do it, so can you!

t_ch: 呜…泡泡，明白了……
t_en: Awoo... thank you, Lady Trinnon...

t_ch: 好啦！赛事要紧，我宣布——{NICKNAME}选手从淘汰赛阶段晋级，请收下这枚「金盏徽章」，你已经赢得了冠军赛的宝贵资格。
t_en: Alright! As the contest must go on — {NICKNAME}, congratulations on advancing from the Elimination Rounds! Please accept this Golden Chalice Badge — you've earned a coveted spot in the Championship.

t_ch: 接下来，请公民朋友们和选手们休息一段时间，静待冠军赛……
t_en: Now, everyone please take a short break as we prepare for the Championship...

t_ch: 缇宁大人，我们都相信，你做到了！
t_en: You already have, Lady Trinnon, we've all seen it!

t_ch: ——不好啦！大地兽冲进来啦！
t_en: Heeeelp! A dromas has broken in!

t_ch: 一只成年大地兽冲进了低温浴池，如果它也算一种「小海豹」，无疑是位重量级选手。
t_en: An adult dromas dashes into the cold bath. If it counts as a "baby seal," it's certainly a heavyweight contestant.

t_ch: 什么情况？！
t_en: What's going on here!?

t_ch: *愤怒地*呜嗡——
t_en: *Enraged* Urrhh... uuuhhhh—

t_ch: 不好了，预言又实现了！
t_en: This is bad, another prophecy has come true!

t_ch: 当选手的时候，还有点紧张，当观众就可以放下心来享受欢乐啦！
t_en: It was nerve-wracking being a contestant, but as an audience member, it's easy to just sit back and enjoy the show!

t_ch: 小小灰别太灰心，小飞儿能偷走奖杯，她偷不走冠军的荣誉。
t_en: Keep your chin up, Little Gray! Little Ciphy may be able to steal the trophy, but she can't steal the glory you won as champion!
